cases.description: Empty input must stay empty (no implicit insertion).
Pure ASCII lowercase passes through untouched.
Kanji are not in any folding axis; they pass through unchanged.
Hiragana without dakuten passes through unchanged.
Choonpu U+30FC (used by both katakana and hiragana) is preserved when the surrounding katakana is mapped to hiragana.
Latin uppercase folds to lowercase via char::to_lowercase.
Mixed-case ASCII (incl. spaces) folds entirely to lowercase.
Fullwidth uppercase Ｐ normalizes via NFKC + lowercase to ASCII p.
Halfwidth uppercase P lowercases to p.
Fullwidth lowercase ｐ normalizes via NFKC to ASCII p.
Halfwidth lowercase p passes through (identity).
Fullwidth Latin word (Ｐｙｔｈｮｮｮｮ) folds through NFKC + lowercase to ASCII python.
Fullwidth digits ０-９ fold to halfwidth ASCII via NFKC.
NFKC folds fullwidth punctuation to its halfwidth ASCII equivalents.
Fullwidth katakana カ maps to hiragana か (kana-variant fold).
Hiragana か is the canonical form (identity).
Halfwidth katakana ｶ normalizes via NFKC to fullwidth カ then to hiragana か.
Fullwidth katakana ガ maps to hiragana が; dakuten is preserved (kept distinct from か).
Hiragana が is the canonical form (identity).
Halfwidth katakana ｶ + dakuten ﾞ composes via NFKC into single ガ, then katakana→hiragana yields が. Dakuten is preserved.
Fullwidth katakana パ maps to hiragana ぱ; handakuten is preserved.
Hiragana ぱ is the canonical form (identity).
Halfwidth katakana ﾊ + handakuten ﾟ composes via NFKC into single パ, then katakana→hiragana yields ぱ.
Fullwidth katakana ヴ (U+30F4) maps to hiragana ゔ (U+3094) via the -0x60 katakana→hiragana shift.
Halfwidth ｳ + dakuten ﾞ composes via NFKC into ヴ, then yields ゔ.
Hiragana か U+304B + combining dakuten U+3099 composes via NFKC into precomposed が U+304C.
Halfwidth ｶ U+FF76 + halfwidth dakuten ﾞ U+FF9E composes via NFKC into fullwidth ガ then yields が.
Whole-string fixture from the design doc: kanji passes through, halfwidth katakana becomes hiragana, Latin lowercases.
cases.expected: 東京 とうきょう tokyo

cases.description: Halfwidth katakana sequence with dakuten ｶﾞｯｺｳ resolves through NFKC + kana fold to がっこう, and Latin token lowercases.
Emoji (outside NFKC compatibility tables) pass through unchanged.
Extension kanji like 𠮷 U+20BB7 (encoded as a UTF-16 surrogate pair on the consumer side) pass through unchanged.
ASCII whitespace runs are preserved verbatim (not collapsed).
Fullwidth space U+3000 normalizes to ASCII space via NFKC.
Under the nfkc_case_fold profile, katakana is NOT mapped to hiragana (kana variants stay distinct).
Under nfkc_case_fold, half-width katakana still recomposes to full-width katakana via NFKC, but stays katakana (not hiragana).
Under nfkc_case_fold, full-width Latin still folds to lowercase ASCII (only the kana-unification axis is dropped).

inequalities.description: Dakuten is preserved, not folded, so voiced が and unvoiced か normalize to distinct keys under loose.
Handakuten is preserved, so ぱ and は normalize to distinct keys under loose.
Dakuten ば and handakuten ぱ are distinct diacritics and must normalize to distinct keys under loose.
Under nfkc_case_fold the kana-unification axis is dropped, so katakana カ and hiragana か normalize to distinct keys.
